method: torch.cuda.mem_get_info / torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated (rocm-smi is a Linux ROCm tool, absent on this native-Windows stack)

not_measured.verifier_int8: bitsandbytes unavailable on Windows-ROCm (Phase-0 gate MISS) - Tier 1

note: fp16 verifier (7.7 GB) + fp16 drafter (1.8 GB) with generation peak 9.5 GB leaves ~15 GB headroom on the 24 GB card, so the full-precision pair fits comfortably. INT8/NF4 configs need bitsandbytes (Tier 1) and cannot be measured on this stack; the GGUF sizes above are the on-disk quantized footprints of the llama.cpp verifier/draft used for the baselines.
